meta.title: A Large Supply Chain Security Program
meta.description:
OEMs are expected to deliver secure products and services. The NIST, CISA, and MITRE frameworks are just the start. Are they enough?

Cassie Crossley describes how a very large OEM, Schneider Electric, has structured more than 13 supply chain security initiatives including R&D security, secure development, SBOMs, vulnerability management, and 3rd party risk management.
